<a name="FilePickerPlugin.PickFile"></a>
### func \(\*FilePickerPlugin\) PickFile

```go
func (p *FilePickerPlugin) PickFile(options PickerOptions) (string, error)
```

PickFile triggers the native file picker. Results are delivered asynchronously via the "filepicker:result" event.
